name: Ask Concentration Z-Score (Extreme Quantile)
hypothesis: An even more extreme concentration of liquidity on the ask side (z-score > 3.5) represents an almost insurmountable wall of resistance. This should lead to a higher probability of price reversion (downward move) and potentially higher expectancy than the previous threshold of 3.0.
mutation_note: Following the explicit feedback to 'tighten_threshold', this spec increases the z-score threshold from 3.0 to 3.5 to test if a higher-conviction signal subset exists.
